commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
And of This verse is omitted in Paralipomenon, (Haydock) whence we find Helon and Gethremmon (probably the same as Aialon and Beth-remmon, ver. 24, assigned to Ephraim.
Eltheco. See chap. xv. 59., and xix. 44.
Gabathon continued a long time in the hands of the Philistines, 3 Kings xv. 27.
